title: Auction of Government of India Dated Securities
description: Government of India (GoI) has announced the sale (issue / re-issue) of two dated securities for a notified amount of ₹32,000 crore as per the following details: Sr No Security Date of Repayment Notified Amount (₹ Crore) GoI specific Notification Auction Date Settlement Date 1 6.36% GS 2031 Feb 16, 2031 21,000 F.No.4(1)-B(W&M)/2026 dated May 11, 2026 May 15, 2026 (Friday) May 18, 2026 (Monday) 2 New GS 2066 May 18, 2066 11,000   Total   32,000       2. GoI
